character_dossiers.name: John Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Organized the crew for the voyage, engaged Long John Silver as cook, resides in Bristol, and has a banker's account.

character_dossiers.name: Long John Silver
character_dossiers.biography: Former sailor, lost a leg in service, works as a cook, and has a banker's account.

character_dossiers.name: Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: Received the letter from Trelawney, is going to sea, and left his home in Bristol.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Sent to see his mother with Redruth's guard, later joins the voyage.

character_dossiers.name: Tom Redruth
character_dossiers.biography: Squire who repaired the Admiral Benbow inn and accompanied Livesey to Bristol.

character_dossiers.name: Blandly
character_dossiers.biography: Sent a consort to search for the crew if they don't return by August.

character_dossiers.name: Arrow
character_dossiers.biography: Sailing master chosen by Long John Silver.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: Visited the Admiral Benbow inn and is present in Bristol.
